data.title: Planet Lunch News
MOVE Index Decline Sparks Speculation on Federal Reserve Actions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the MOVE index has been steadily declining since Monday, currently standing at 114.64. This figure is significantly below the threshold of 140 points, which Arthur Hayes previously suggested could prompt the Federal Reserve to resume liquidity measures. Hayes had indicated that if the MOVE index surpasses 140, it might lead to renewed intervention by the Federal Reserve.

data.title: LBank has launched JProof (JPROOF)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank has launched JProof (JPROOF) at 11:30 (SGT) on April 19, and opened the JPEOOF/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 12:00 on April 20.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based BANK perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1 to 50 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched U-based BANK perpetual contracts with a leverage range of 1-50 times. Contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: Solana surpasses Ethereum in daily DEX volume with $1.887B in trades
data.description:
19-4-2025 – Solana’s network has outpaced its rival Ethereum in daily DEX trading activity. Fresh data compiled by DeFiLlama has unveiled that Solana-based decentralised exchanges processed a staggering $1. 887 billion worth of trades within a single day, whilst Ethereum’s DEX volume settled at $1. 182 billion
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/solana-surpasses-ethereum-in-daily-dex-volume-with-1-887b-in-trades/

data.title: Pi Network’s New Migration Roadmap: Lags Timeline, Dates, and Exact Criteria.
data.description:
The post Pi Network’s New Migration Roadmap: Lags Timeline, Dates, and Exact Criteria. The roadmap outlines a three-phase plan to move millions of users, or “Pioneers,” to the open network.   But here’s the catch—there’s no timeline, no dates, and still a lot of uncertainty
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/pi-networks-new-migration-roadmap-lags-timeline-dates-and-exact-criteria/
